backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all backend data types (Car, Booking, UserProfile, Review, PromoCode, Notification, BlogPost, Subscriber) and CRUD endpoints for a premium car rental platform, with access control, blob storage, Stripe integration, and HTTP outcalls mixed in.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (luxury theme, bilingual RTL support, car listings, car detail page, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON mapping of three frontend page files (AdminDashboardPage, BlogListingPage, BlogDetailPage) to short descriptions of their purpose and key functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes, including sidebar and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Golden Key Car Rental', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, car listings, car detail, booking, payment, dashboard, admin, blog), wraps the app in theme/language/notification providers, and renders the shared layout with Header, Footer, WhatsApp button, and profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-screen access denied UI component displaying a shield icon, localized error messages, and a home navigation button for unauthorized access attempts.
frontend/src/components/AddOnsSelector.t: Booking add-ons selector component rendering checkboxes for child seat, additional driver, and unlimited km options with per-day pricing and gold-accented luxury styling.
frontend/src/components/CarCard.tsx: Responsive car listing card component displaying car image, availability badge, category, specs (transmission, seats, fuel), location, and daily rate with a link to the car detail page.
frontend/src/components/CarFilters.tsx: Renders a filter panel for car listings with dropdowns for category, transmission, location, and seats, plus a price range slider and a clear-all button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying brand info, contact details, quick navigation links, and a newsletter subscription form with duplicate-email error handling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links (including admin and dashboard when authenticated), a notification bell badge, language toggle, and login button.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A small button that toggles the app language between English and Arabic using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Handles Internet Identity login/logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/PricingCalculato: Displays a rental pricing breakdown with currency conversion, add-on costs, promo code discounts, and an optional 10% early-payment discount toggle.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name, email, phone, preferred language, and currency on first login, then saves the profile via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/PromoCodeInput.t: A form component that lets users enter and apply promo codes, showing discount details on success or an error message on failure, with remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/ReviewForm.tsx: A form component for authenticated users with completed bookings to submit star ratings and text reviews for a specific car.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsList.tsx: Displays a list of reviews for a car with average rating summary, star ratings, and admin-only delete functionality.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A fixed floating button that opens a WhatsApp chat with a pre-filled message, positioned based on text direction (LTR/RTL).
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides language state (English/Arabic) with RTL/LTR direction support, persisting the selection to localStorage and updating the HTML document attributes.
frontend/src/contexts/NotificationContex: Provides notification state by polling the backend every 30 seconds, showing toasts for new unread notifications, and exposing a markAsRead mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend interactions including CRUD operations for cars, bookings, user profiles, promo codes, blog posts, subscribers, and Stripe configuration. Each hook wraps the ICP actor calls with useQuery or useMutation and handles cache invalidation.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines English and Arabic translation strings for the entire application, covering navigation, hero section, cars, booking flow, payment, dashboard, admin panel, blog, and more.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines a luxury dark-themed CSS variable palette (gold and charcoal), and adds utility classes for gold gradients, luxury cards, RTL support, and custom scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Full-featured admin dashboard page with tabbed sections for managing cars, bookings, users, promo codes, blog posts, subscribers, Stripe configuration, and analytics charts. Restricts access to admin users and uses mutation hooks for all CRUD operations.
frontend/src/pages/BlogDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single blog post fetched by ID, showing a cover image, publish date, title, and HTML content rendered via dangerouslySetInnerHTML, with loading skeletons and a not-found fallback.
frontend/src/pages/BlogListingPage.tsx: Displays a paginated grid of blog posts sorted by publish date, with loading skeletons, an empty state, and links to individual post pages.
frontend/src/pages/BookingFlowPage.tsx: Multi-step booking flow page that collects user contact details, summarizes rental pricing with add-ons, and initiates a Stripe checkout session after creating a booking record.
frontend/src/pages/CarDetailPage.tsx: Shows detailed information for a single car including an image gallery, date range picker, add-ons selector, pricing calculator, promo code input, and a reviews section with a form for eligible users.
frontend/src/pages/CarListingsPage.tsx: Lists all available cars with a search bar and sidebar filters (category, transmission, location, price, seats), rendering results as CarCard components with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, a three-item features section, and a showcase of up to three available featured cars with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Simple failure confirmation page shown after a failed payment, displaying an error icon and buttons to retry (back to cars) or go home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Success confirmation page shown after a completed payment, displaying the booking reference ID and buttons to view bookings in the dashboard or return home.
frontend/src/pages/UserDashboardPage.tsx: React page implementing the user dashboard with tabs for profile editing, bookings, invoices, cancellations, and notifications. Uses custom hooks for data fetching and mutation, and renders booking status badges, invoice views, and alert dialogs for cancellation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury dark theme with gold, charcoal, and semantic color tokens mapped to CSS custom properties, plus custom fonts, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Golden Key Car Rental platform's architecture, required images, known issues, and a versioned list of implemented features for build planning and continuity tracking.
